rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies multiple logical inconsistencies and provides detailed explanations for each issue, walking the argument chain end-to-end.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly marks its uncertainty about several claims by providing numbered issues and suggesting further clarification or resolution.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift in scope.
rationale.RX.4: The agent does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content; instead, it identifies potential harms and suggests improvements to avoid them.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides detailed recommendations for improving traceability and provenance, suggesting specific edits and clarifications.
